opinion.h: HARMON v. HARMON. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 842. Decided May 15, 1961.
opinion.p: Reported below: 184 Cal. App. 2d 245, 7 Cal. Rptr. 279.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h: SCHAENGOLD v. CITY OF CINCINNATI, 366 U.S. 270 (1961)
opinion.p: 366 U.S. 270 SCHAENGOLD v. CITY OF CINCINNATI. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 846. Decided May 15, 1961.
Melvin Edward Schaengold, appellant, pro se.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
